My secret spy satellite informs me that on 25-Sep-97, andreas@FreeBSD.ORG
wrote:

>>Number:         4626
>>Category:       ports
>>Synopsis:       inn port, active file contains control characters

FWIW, I have seen the EXACT SAME thing happen on the inn package under
Linux (RedHat 4.2, kernel 2.0.30), so this is definitely not a FreeBSD
problem.
